headline: Did APD’s New Hydrogen Boiler and Portable Fueler Just Shift Its Clean-Energy Investment Narrative?
summary: At the Canadian Hydrogen Convention held in April 2026 in Edmonton, Air Products and Chemicals showcased its hydrogen technologies, including a hydrogen–capable low NOx boiler burner and a next-generation liquid-to-gaseous portable hydrogen fueler designed to support lower-emission heavy industry and transportation across Canada. An interesting aspect for investors is how these technologies aim to retrofit existing industrial infrastructure and expand flexible hydrogen fueling access,...
